Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Effects of Lord of Ascendant in Annual Chart
1. Annual chart Lord in auspicious house in Annual Chart:
2. Annual Asc. Lord (Varsha Lagnesh) in conjunction or aspect with benefics gives
excess of wealth, eduction, happiness.
3. Annual Asc. Lord (Varsha Lagnesh) in conjunction or aspect with malefics gives
bodily troubles and miseries.
4. Annual Asc. Lord (Varsha Lagnesh) with benefics gives prosperity.
5. Annual Asc. Lord in 3, 10, 11 – honour, favourable
